subcodes.first_line: O son of the Kingdom! If thou desirest to marry, thou must choose a Bahá'í maiden who is believing and assured, firm and steadfast, and possessed of both material and spiritual perfections [3.5s]... ...Thou hast written regarding the four canine teeth in man, saying that these teeth, two in the upper jaw and two in the lower, are for the purpose of eating meat
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پسر ملکوت اگر اراده تزویج نمودی باید یک دختر بهائی گیری که مؤمن و موقن باشد و ثابت و راسخ و حائز کمالات مادیّه و معنویّه
subcodes.subjects: @consumption of meat; vegetarianism; diet, @the state of prayer; dynamics of prayer, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
